subject: math
title: Geometry: Area and Perimeter
content: Geometry studies shapes, sizes, and space. Area measures the space inside a shape. Perimeter measures the distance around a shape. For a rectangle, area equals length times width, and perimeter equals 2 times length plus 2 times width.

questions.prompt: What is the area of a rectangle with length 5 and width 3?

questions.hint: Perimeter is like walking around the border.

questions.prompt: What is the perimeter of a rectangle with length 6 and width 2?
A square has side length 4. What is its area?
questions.hint: Area of a square is side times side.
